decisions.title: Enable auto-suspend on Snowflake analytics warehouse
decisions.rationale: two-minute timeout saves about $6k/mo in idle compute

decisions.title: Decommission the old GKE cluster
decisions.rationale: only one staging workload remains and it's easy to move
decisions.source_quote: Let's decommission the old GKE cluster

decisions.title: Defer reserved-instance commitment
decisions.rationale: traffic pattern has shifted; need benchmarks before a 1-year commit

action_items.title: Ship Snowflake auto-suspend config
action_items.source_quote: ship the auto-suspend config by end of this week

action_items.title: Present reserved-instance analysis at budget sync
action_items.source_quote: present the RI analysis at next week's budget sync

summary.tldr: Q3 budget review surfaced 18% cloud-spend overrun. Team approved Snowflake auto-suspend and old GKE cluster decommission, deferred reserved-instance commitment for benchmarking. Marketing $40k shortfall raised to board — no in-room action.
highlights: Decommission old GKE cluster by April 30
